name: OpenViking
description: OpenClaw context-engine plugin for memory management — powered by OpenViking

baseUrl.label: OpenViking Base URL
baseUrl.help: HTTP URL when mode is remote (or ${OPENVIKING_BASE_URL})

peer_role.label: Peer Role
peer_role.help: Controls which messages include peer_id: none, assistant, or person. New installs default to none.

peer_prefix.label: Peer Prefix
peer_prefix.help: Optional prefix for assistant peer_id values derived from OpenClaw runtime agent IDs.

apiKey.label: OpenViking API Key
apiKey.help: Optional API key for OpenViking server

accountId.label: Account ID
accountId.help: Advanced option. Tenant account ID. Only needed when explicitly sending identity headers, such as root-key or trusted deployments. With a user key the server derives identity from the key.

userId.label: User ID
userId.help: Advanced option. Tenant user ID. Only needed when explicitly sending identity headers.

targetUri.label: Search Target URI
targetUri.help: Default OpenViking target URI for memory search

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Extract memories from recent conversation messages via OpenViking sessions

captureMode.label: Capture Mode
captureMode.help: semantic captures all eligible user text; keyword uses trigger regex first

captureMaxLength.label: Capture Max Length
captureMaxLength.help: Maximum sanitized user text length allowed for auto-capture

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant OpenViking memories into agent context

recallResources.label: Recall Resources
recallResources.help: Include resources (viking://resources) in auto-recall and default memory_recall search. Enables account-level shared knowledge retrieval.

recallMaxInjectedChars.label: Recall Max Injected Chars
recallMaxInjectedChars.help: Maximum total characters for auto-recall memory injection. Complete memories that do not fit are skipped, not truncated.

recallMaxContentChars.label: Deprecated Recall Max Content Chars
recallMaxContentChars.help: Deprecated compatibility option and will be removed in a future release. Auto-recall now keeps individual memories intact and uses recallMaxInjectedChars.

recallPreferAbstract.label: Recall Prefer Abstract
recallPreferAbstract.help: Use memory abstract instead of fetching full content when available

recallTokenBudget.label: Deprecated Recall Token Budget
recallTokenBudget.help: Deprecated compatibility alias and will be removed in a future release. Use recallMaxInjectedChars.

bypassSessionPatterns.label: Bypass Session Patterns
bypassSessionPatterns.help: Completely bypass OpenViking for matching session keys. Use * within one segment and ** across segments.

commitTokenThreshold.label: Commit Token Threshold
commitTokenThreshold.help: Minimum estimated pending tokens before auto-commit triggers. Set to 0 to commit every turn.

commitKeepRecentCount.label: Commit Keep Recent Count
commitKeepRecentCount.help: WM v2: number of most-recent messages kept live after an afterTurn commit. Compact path always uses 0.

emitStandardDiagnostics.label: Standard diagnostics (diag JSON lines)
emitStandardDiagnostics.help: Emit structured openviking: diag {...} for assemble/afterTurn. Set false to disable.

logFindRequests.label: Log find requests
logFindRequests.help: Log tenant routing: /search/find + session messages/commit (X-OpenViking-*; not apiKey). Or set env OPENVIKING_LOG_ROUTING=1 or OPENVIKING_DEBUG=1.

mode.description: Legacy field kept for backward compatibility. Only 'remote' is supported.

peer_role.description: Controls which session messages include peer_id.

peer_prefix.description: Optional prefix for assistant peer_id values.

serverAuthMode.description: Deprecated and ignored. Tenant identity headers are controlled by explicit accountId/userId.
